description: Check current network connections and open ports
name: network_scan

description: Hash comparison on critical files against baseline
name: file_integrity_check

description: Check email against known breaches (stub)
name: breach_check

description: Check host firewall status and active rules
name: firewall_status

description: Run active threat detection scan on the system
name: threat_scan

description: Monitor network traffic for anomalies in real time
name: network_monitor

description: Scan system for known vulnerabilities
name: vulnerability_scan

description: Analyze system and security logs for suspicious patterns
name: log_analysis

description: Generate a security alert for Harbinger
name: security_alert

description: Assess threat level of an event
name: threat_assess

description: Move suspicious file to quarantine directory
name: quarantine_file

description: Parse and analyze a firewall configuration file
name: firewall_analyze

description: Score a firewall config on security best practices
name: firewall_evaluate

description: Compare multiple firewall configs side by side
name: firewall_compare

description: Explain a single firewall rule in plain English with equivalents
name: firewall_explain_rule

description: Generate a complete firewall config from requirements
name: firewall_generate

description: Study firewall concepts and store in Grimoire
name: security_learn

description: Study a known attack pattern for defensive understanding
name: threat_analyze

description: Analyze log entries for signs of attack or suspicious activity
name: threat_log_analyze

description: Build a complete defense profile for a list of threats
name: threat_defense_profile

description: Study a known malware family for defensive understanding
name: threat_malware_study

description: Generate a detection rule for a specific threat
name: threat_detection_rule

description: Assess Shadow's specific threat surface
name: threat_shadow_assessment

description: Store threat intelligence in Grimoire
name: threat_knowledge_store

description: Evaluate an action plan against safety rules
name: safety_check

description: Pre-execution safety hook for tool calls
name: hook_pre_tool

description: Post-execution safety hook for tool results
name: hook_post_tool

description: Scan a model response for confabulation phrases (e.g. claiming background work). Logs warnings but does not block.
name: validate_response

parameters.has_async_task: bool — True if an async task was actually submitted (suppresses false positives for legitimate background phrases)
parameters.response_text: str — the full model response text

description: Write to immutable audit trail
name: audit_log

description: Verify Cerberus config has not been tampered with
name: config_integrity_check

description: Look up biblical ethical guidance for a concept
name: ethical_guidance

parameters.concept: str — the ethical concept to look up

description: Record a false positive safety check for rule tuning
name: false_positive_log

parameters.category: str — category of the false positive
parameters.check_id: str — ID of the check that was a false positive
parameters.notes: str — explanation of why this was a false positive

description: Get false positive calibration stats per category
name: calibration_stats

parameters.days: int — number of days to look back (default: 30)

description: Evaluate an action against biblical ethics using ESV Scripture passages and study notes. Returns ethical category, relevant passages, assessment, and recommendation.
name: ethics_lookup

parameters.action: str — the action or tool being evaluated
parameters.plan: str — description of what the action does

description: List available rollback snapshots
name: rollback_snapshot

description: Roll back to a previous snapshot
name: rollback_execute

description: One-time override for a blocked action. Does not change rules. Only callable by external input sources (user, Telegram).
name: creator_exception

parameters.action_category: str — category of the blocked action
parameters.action_details: dict — optional details about the action
parameters.blocked_action_id: str — ID from the blocked safety_check result

description: Permanently reclassify a blocked category. Cerberus learns from this. Only callable by external input sources (user, Telegram).
name: creator_authorize

parameters.action_category: str — category of the blocked action
parameters.action_details: dict — optional details about the action
parameters.blocked_action_id: str — ID from the blocked safety_check result

description: Get report on categories with frequent creator exceptions. Feeds into Harbinger daily safety report.
name: false_positive_report
